zh.Walsham Le Willows, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯
zh.Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, Un: 英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯
zh.Walsham-le-Willows, Mid Suffolk, Suffolk: 英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯
zh.Walsham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可瓦爾申馬
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hawys於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯時，他的父親William Hawys19歲，母親Mansilla Milicent17歲。他於1342年與Hillary de Cranmere在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hawys于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯时，他的父亲William Hawys19岁，母亲Mansilla Milicent17岁。他于1342年与Hillary de Cranmere在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: of Norman origin, from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English Haueis, Hawis, from an Old French form of the ancient Germanic female personal name Hadewidis (from had- ‘war’ + wid- with a range of possible original meanings).
variant of Haw , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Haw
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Haw(e) which, like Daw(e), was probably a rhyming pet form of Middle English Raw (Ralph). Similar rhyming pet forms of other Anglo-Norman male personal names beginning with R- are found in Hick and Dick for Rick (Richard) and Hob and Dob for Rob(ert). See also Hawkin .
English: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from Middle English hawe ‘enclosure’ (Old English haga or Old Norse hagi). Compare Haugh .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hawys was born about 1310, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Hawys, was 19 and his mother, Mansilla Milicent, was 17. He married Hillary de Cranmere in 1342, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

Il a épousé Hillary de Cranmere en 1342, à Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hawysが約1310年にイギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズで生まれた時，父William Hawysは19歳，母Mansilla Milicentは17歳であった。1342年にイギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズでHillary de Cranmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스
ko.Walsham-le-Willows, Mid Suffolk, Suffolk: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스
ko.lifeSummary: John Hawys(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hawys(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mansilla Milicent(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 Hillary de Cranmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hawys родился около 1310 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Hawys было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mansilla Milicent, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Hillary de Cranmere в 1342 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.
